Add a white paper mat between the frame: Add a white paper mat between the frame and the artwork.
Aggressively crops the image to center o: Aggressively crops the image to center on the largest face found. Good for portraits.
Anchor Description: Hint which region to keep when cropping
Are you sure you want to delete all save: Are you sure you want to delete all saved favorites?

Are you sure? This will delete ALL downl: Are you sure? This will delete ALL downloaded images from disk. You will need internet to see new wallpapers.
Authorize your Google account to select: Authorize your Google account to select and download your personal photo albums directly into Spice.
Automatically check for new versions of: Automatically check for new versions of Spice on startup.
Automatically synchronize your wallhaven: Automatically synchronize your wallhaven collections with Spice. New collections will be added as inactive queries.
Browse to a folder on your computer cont: Browse to a folder on your computer containing wallpaper images.
Clear the blocked images list. Blocked i: Clear the blocked images list. Blocked images may be downloaded next time wallpapers are refreshed.
Click the tray icon to download version: Click the tray icon to download version {{.Version}}.
Configure how often wallpapers change an: Configure how often wallpapers change and how many images are kept locally.
Control how images are fitted to your sc: Control how images are fitted to your screen and optimized for faces.

Control how images are fitted to your screen:
- Disabled: Original image.
- Quality: Rejects images with mismatched aspect ratio.
- Flexibility: Allows high-res images to crop aggressively.
Control the background wall behind the f: Control the background wall behind the frame.
Controls whether Spice automatically dow: Controls whether Spice automatically downloads new wallpapers each night. Background maintenance tasks (cache cleanup, metadata sync) always run regardless of this setting.
Delete all downloaded wallpapers (Source: Delete all downloaded wallpapers (Source and Derivatives). This is a safety feature.
Disable if you prefer the wallpaper to c: Disable if you prefer the wallpaper to change only based on its timer or a manual refresh.
Disable this if Alt+Arrow conflicts with: Disable this if Alt+Arrow conflicts with your browser or other apps.
Display the entire uncropped image on a: Display the entire uncropped image on a generated background
Dynamically generate a museum-style fram: Dynamically generate a museum-style frame and matting for artwork.
Enable or disable system notifications f: Enable or disable system notifications from Spice.
Expand your wallpaper rotation by accept: Expand your wallpaper rotation by accepting images that do not naturally fit your screen and presenting them in a gallery frame instead of skipping them.
Get a free API key from Pexels.
Google Photos is a photo sharing and sto: Google Photos is a photo sharing and storage service developed by Google.
Introduces a random delay when changing: Introduces a random delay when changing wallpapers across multiple screens to prevent a jarring simultaneous flash.
Local favorites are stored persistently: Local favorites are stored persistently in your Spice application folder.
Manage your Pexels image queries here.
Manage your wallhaven.cc image queries a: Manage your wallhaven.cc image queries and collections here. Paste your image search or collection URL and Spice will take care of the rest.
Must be a positive integer or 0: Must be a positive integer or 0
Note (Windows): Due to OS limitations, t: Note (Windows): Due to OS limitations, to select a folder you must click on any image file inside the desired folder and then click 'Open'. The entire folder containing that image will be added.
One of America's most distinguished comp: One of America's most distinguished comprehensive art museums. Its Open Access collection spans 6,000 years of achievement in art, all freely available for any use.
One of the world's great art museums, ho: One of the world's great art museums, housing icons like Nighthawks and American Gothic.
Pexels provides high quality and complet: Pexels provides high quality and completely free stock photos licensed under the Pexels license.

Present all artwork from this collection: Present all artwork from this collection inside a virtual museum frame with a dynamic background, regardless of its original dimensions.

Select the application language. Restart: Select the application language. Restart may be required for full effect.
Set how many images to cache for faster: Set how many images to cache for faster startup and less network usage. Set to "None" to disable caching.
Set how often the wallpaper changes in m: Set how often the wallpaper changes in minutes. Set to 0 for Never.
Spice registers itself to start with Win: Spice registers itself to start with Windows. Click to open Windows Settings to enable or disable this feature.
Spice requires OpenGL 2.0+ or hardware a: Spice requires OpenGL 2.0+ or hardware acceleration to show windows. The application will continue to run in the background. Please try rebooting your machine to restore graphics functionality.
Synchronize Spice with currently connect: Synchronize Spice with currently connected monitors. Use this if you plugged or unplugged a monitor while Spice was running.
The J. Paul Getty Museum features Europe: The J. Paul Getty Museum features European paintings, drawings, sculpture, illuminated manuscripts, decorative arts, and photography from its beginnings to the present, gathered internationally.
The National Palace Museum houses one of: The National Palace Museum houses one of the largest collections of Chinese imperial artifacts and artworks in the world.
The crown jewel of New York City. From a: The crown jewel of New York City. From ancient Egyptian temples to modern masterpieces, The Met houses 5,000 years of humanity's greatest creative achievements.
The national museum of the Netherlands,: The national museum of the Netherlands, home to Rembrandt's Night Watch, Vermeer's Milkmaid, and the finest collection of Dutch Golden Age masterpieces in the world.
The size of the framed artwork relative: The size of the framed artwork relative to the total screen height.

To continue using Spice, please review a: To continue using Spice, please review and accept the End User License Agreement.
Use keyboard shortcuts to control wallpa: Use keyboard shortcuts to control wallpapers. Disable if they conflict with other apps.
Uses face detection to hint the smart cr: Uses face detection to hint the smart cropper. Keeps faces in frame but balances with other image details.
Wikimedia Commons is a media file reposi: Wikimedia Commons is a media file repository making public domain and freely-licensed educational media content available to everyone.
Write verbose debug entries to the log f: Write verbose debug entries to the log file. Useful for troubleshooting.
